chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.139 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection and reply as at “A” 2. For hearing of main case --------------------------------------------- 21.04.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------- None present for the applicant. Same position was on the last date of hearing. Continuous absence of the applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue their case, therefore, the same is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
